perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall automatically extend for an additional two (2) years on the same terms herein ("Renewal Term") provided WPT receives payments greater than twelve million U.S. dollars ($12,000,000) within the Initial Term.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall automatically extend for an additional two (2) years on the same terms herein ("Renewal Term") provided WPT receives payments greater than twelve million U.S. dollars ($12,000,000) within the Initial Term and Zynga consents in writing to the renewal.
perturbation.explanation: This change adds a condition of Zynga's written consent for automatic renewal, contradicting the initially stated condition of only WPT receiving payments greater than $12,000,000 within the Initial Term. This in-text contradiction creates uncertainty. If Zynga doesn't give written consent, it is unclear if the agreement is automatically extended or not despite WPT fullfilling the conditions.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement will be in effect for three (3) years from the Effective Date ("Initial Term") unless terminated earlier in accordance with this Agreement. This Agreement shall automatically extend for an additional two (2) years on the same terms herein ("Renewal Term") provided WPT receives payments greater than twelve million U.S. dollars ($12,000,000) within the Initial Term and Zynga consents in writing to the renewal. The Initial Term and any such Renewal Term are collectively referred to as the "Term."
perturbation.justification: The original text states the agreement automatically extends if WPT receives payments greater than $12,000,000. The changed text adds a condition of Zynga's written consent. The contradicted text contains both the original and changed text. This creates a contradiction because if WPT receives the required payments but Zynga withholds consent, it is unclear whether the agreement automatically extends, thus creating ambiguity and inconsistency within the document, aligning with the definition of 'Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: Annual Minimum Guarantee. Zynga will pay WPT three million U.S. dollars ($3,000,000) per year according to the following schedule (which the parties may alter upon mutual agreement) (the "Annual Minimum Guarantee"): a. Within thirty (30) days of executing this Agreement: $1.5M b. July 1, 2018: $1.5M c. January 1, 2019: $1.5M d. July 1, 2019: $1.5M e. January 1, 2020: $1.5M f. July 1, 2020: $1.5M
perturbation.changed_text: Annual Minimum Guarantee. Zynga will pay WPT three million U.S. dollars ($3,000,000) per year according to the following schedule (which the parties may alter at Zynga's discretion) (the "Annual Minimum Guarantee"): a. Within thirty (30) days of executing this Agreement: $1.0M b. July 1, 2018: $2.0M c. January 1, 2019: $0.0M d. July 1, 2019: $2.0M e. January 1, 2020: $1.0M f. July 1, 2020: $2.0M
perturbation.explanation: This change grants Zynga unilateral power to alter the schedule of payments, contradicting the initial statement that changes require 'mutual agreement.' This creates uncertainty about the enforceability of the original schedule. If Zynga chooses to alter the payments as shown in the changed_text, and WPT does not agree, it is unclear which payment schedule applies. Also the total amount being paid is now over 3,000,000.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Annual Minimum Guarantee. Zynga will pay WPT three million U.S. dollars ($3,000,000) per year according to the following schedule (which the parties may alter at Zynga's discretion) (the "Annual Minimum Guarantee"): a. Within thirty (30) days of executing this Agreement: $1.0M b. July 1, 2018: $2.0M c. January 1, 2019: $0.0M d. July 1, 2019: $2.0M e. January 1, 2020: $1.0M f. July 1, 2020: $2.0M
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that changes to the payment schedule require 'mutual agreement.' The changed text grants Zynga unilateral power to alter the payment schedule 'at Zynga's discretion.' This creates a direct contradiction as the original 'mutual agreement' is nullified. The contradicted text is a replica of the changed text, highlighting the conflicting changes to the payment schedule and altering of the mutual agreement. Furthermore, the changed text has a total payment amount exceeding the $3,000,000 annual amount specified in the initial text, leading to inconsistencies.

perturbation.original_text: Zynga will, within thirty (30) days of the end of each calendar quarter, commencing with the first full calendar quarter following the Effective Date, furnish WPT with complete statements containing the following information with respect to all Net Revenue from the use of the WPT-brand on the Zynga platform, during the preceding period covered by such statement: the Territory; the amount due WPT (or the remaining unrecouped Annual Minimum Guarantee balance as applicable); Net Revenue; Royalties rate; the distribution channels or portals, the platform, the territory(ies), and itemized Allowable Deductions ("Royalty Statement(s)").
perturbation.changed_text: Zynga will use reasonable efforts to, within sixty (60) days of the end of each calendar quarter, commencing with the first full calendar quarter following the Effective Date, furnish WPT with statements containing high level information with respect to all Net Revenue from the use of the WPT-brand on the Zynga platform, during the preceding period covered by such statement: the Territory; the amount due WPT (or the remaining unrecouped Annual Minimum Guarantee balance as applicable); Net Revenue; Royalties rate; the distribution channels or portals, the platform, the territory(ies), and itemized Allowable Deductions ("Royalty Statement(s)").
perturbation.explanation: The phrase 'Zynga will' replaced with 'Zynga will use reasonable efforts to'. Also, 'thirty (30) days of the end of each calendar quarter' replaced with 'sixty (60) days of the end of each calendar quarter', introduces an in-text contradiction making the action non-binding, whereas it was binding earlier. The term 'complete statements' replaced by 'statements containing high level information' created ambiguity about the quality of Royalty statement. Also this pertubation changes the time frame from 30 days to 60 days for WPT to receive the royalty statement, creating a contracdiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Reporting. Zynga will use reasonable efforts to, within sixty (60) days of the end of each calendar quarter, commencing with the first full calendar quarter following the Effective Date, furnish WPT with statements containing high level information with respect to all Net Revenue from the use of the WPT-brand on the Zynga platform, during the preceding period covered by such statement: the Territory; the amount due WPT (or the remaining unrecouped Annual Minimum Guarantee balance as applicable); Net Revenue; Royalties rate; the distribution channels or portals, the platform, the territory(ies), and itemized Allowable Deductions ("Royalty Statement(s)"). The amount shown to be payable to WPT shall be paid simultaneously with the rendition of the respective Royalty Statement. The statements and payments remitted hereunder shall be delivered to WPT via email to the following email address: Deborah.Frazzetta@wpt.com (ATTN: Deborah Frazzetta, VP, Finance. e. Audit Rights.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated "Zynga will, within thirty (30) days...furnish WPT with complete statements". The changed text modifies this to "Zynga will use reasonable efforts to, within sixty (60) days...furnish WPT with statements containing high level information". This introduces ambiguity and a change in timeframe. The use of "reasonable efforts" makes the obligation less binding compared to the original "Zynga will", creating uncertainty. The change from "complete statements" to "statements containing high level information" also creates ambiguity about the quality of the report. The contradicted text repeats the "reasonable efforts" language and the 60-day timeframe. While the changed text and the contradicted text are now the same, the changed text introduces contradiction because the original text was binding for 30 days and "complete statements," making the action non-binding by saying "reasonable efforts to" furnish "high level information" in 60 days. This aligns with the Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction definition.
